title: Don't Start ANY Claude Code Project Until You Watch This
summary: Austin Marchese outlines 3 rules and 6 moves for building successfully with Claude Code, drawing on Y Combinator CEO Gary Tan's principles. The content covers what not to build, what to build, and how to lead an AI team, based on his experience scaling a $25M+ startup and helping founders generate significant revenue.
